sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n10444" key="a)ntiptai/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντιπταίω</orth>, <sense id="n10444.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">obstruct, stand in the way,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πρός τι</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0648.tlg001.perseus-grc1:17" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Onos.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">17</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
